projectDescription: Silver5 AI is a SaaS platform that automates Binance P2P trading operations — including price positioning, order management, KYC verification, and AI-powered chat — for merchants, VASPs, and OTC desks across Latin America.
keyFeatures: Positioning Bot — 3-mode automated repricing every 5 seconds (conservative, aggressive, fixed price)
Centralized Chats — unified inbox for multiple Binance accounts without sharing credentials
Order Management — automatic capture and intelligent prioritization of 100% of P2P orders
AI Agent — conversational AI that handles customer messages and KYC requests 24/7
KYC & Client Management — automated identity verification via Didit or Sumsub in under 2 minutes
Automatic Messages — event-triggered messages for order creation, payment, and completion
Notifications — real-time Email and WhatsApp alerts with dynamic variables for merchants/operators
Banking Integration — automated payment verification and execution via ZEN.com, Compose, or Bre-B
Multi-account & multi-operator support with role-based access and full audit trail
7-day free trial with no credit card required
publicApiSurface: Didit KYC API — document + biometric verification
ZEN.com banking API — payment verification and execution
